rules.description: Beginning of Message — identifies the beginning of the message and its type. Specifies document type, identifier and message function.

document_name_code.description: Document name code — 335 = Pre booking (Air/Sea), 610 = Forwarding instructions, ZEB = ExternalBookingRequest, ZBJ = BrokerageJob

document_identifier.description: Waybill number or another reference to the message. Must be unique for at least 1 year. Required on all messages.

message_function_code.description: Message function — 1 = Cancellation, 5 = Replace, 9 = Original. For Air/Sea only code 9 is used.

rules.description: Control Total — specifies control totals for the shipment including gross weight, package quantity, volume, loading metres, and pallet spaces. Can occur up to 9 times.

control_total_type_code_qualifier.description: Control total type code qualifier — 7=Total gross weight, 11=Consignment package quantity, 15=Total consignment cube (volume), 19=Total reported quantity in supplementary units (pallet spaces), 57=Total loading metres

control_total_quantity.description: Control total quantity value — numeric value for weight, package count, volume, loading metres, or pallet spaces

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — For qualifier 7 use KGM; for qualifier 11 use package type codes (EUR, PL, PCE, etc.); for qualifier 15 use MTQ; for qualifier 19 use PLL, HLP, or KPL; for qualifier 57 use MTR

rules.description: Communication Contact — provides communication contact details (phone, email, fax) for a party contact. Can occur up to 9 times per CTA.

communication_address_identifier.description: Communication address identifier — phone number, email address, fax number, etc.

communication_means_type_code.description: Communication means type code — AL=Cellular phone, EM=Electronic mail, FX=Telefax, TE=Telephone

rules.description: Charge Payment Instructions — specifies charge payment instructions including who pays for the transport charges. Used within SG6 (up to 9 occurrences).

transport_charges_payment_method_code.description: Transport charges payment method code (e.g., prepaid, collect)

rules.description: Contact Information — identifies the contact person associated with a party (NAD). Mandatory if COM segment is present.
Dangerous Goods — at line item level (SG33). Required for dangerous goods services. If dangerous goods present but no detailed information available, text 'HAZARD' needs to be used.

dangerous_goods_regulations_code.description: Dangerous goods regulations code — ADR = European agreement for road, IMD = IMO IMDG code

hazard_identification_code.description: Hazard identification code. Text 'HAZARD' should be entered if structured information is not available.

hazard_code_version_identifier.description: Hazard code version identifier. For Road, three Sub-Risk values separated by '+' using escape character

dangerous_goods_flashpoint_description.description: Dangerous goods flashpoint description. Road TMS only caters for 4 characters.

shipment_flashpoint_degree.description: Shipment flashpoint degree. Road TMS only caters for 4 characters.

flashpoint_measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code for flashpoint (e.g. CEL for Celsius)

packaging_danger_level_code.description: Packaging danger level code — 1 = Great danger, 2 = Medium danger, 3 = Minor danger

hazard_medical_first_aid_guide_identifie.description: Hazard medical first aid guide identifier

orange_hazard_placard_upper_part_identif.description: Orange hazard placard upper part identifier

orange_hazard_placard_lower_part_identif.description: Orange hazard placard lower part identifier

dangerous_goods_marking_identifier_4.description: Dangerous goods marking identifier (fourth, added by DSV spec)

transport_means_description_code.description: Transport means description code. Use 'LQ' for limited quantity (Road).

rules.description: Dimensions — length, width, height at line item level (SG22). Part of the alternative measurement requirement alongside volume and loading meters.

dimension_type_code_qualifier.description: Dimension type code qualifier — 1 = Gross dimensions

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — CMT = centimetre, MTR = metre. For Road, dimensions must be in MTR.

rules.description: Document Message Details — specifies document or message details, particularly for sea transport documentation types. Can occur up to 9 times.

document_name_code.description: Document name code — 706=Bill of lading original, 712=Non-negotiable maritime transport document, 710=Sea waybill, NON=Non-controlled shipment

document_name_code_list.description: Code list identification code — Not used

document_name_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

communication_medium_type_code.description: Communication medium type code — Not used

document_copies_required_quantity.description: Document copies required quantity — number of document copies needed

document_originals_required_quantity.description: Document originals required quantity — number of original documents needed

rules.description: Date/Time/Period — specifies date/time/period information including delivery date, document issue date, collection date, and transport dates. At least one DTM with qualifier 137 is mandatory.

date_time_period_function_code_qualifier.description: Date/time/period function code qualifier — 2=Delivery date/time requested, 137=Document issue date time, 234=Collection date/time earliest, 132=Transport means arrival estimated, 133=Transport means departure estimated, 171=Reference date/time, 189=Transport means departure scheduled, 232=Transport means arrival scheduled

date_time_period_text.description: Date or time or period value in the format specified by element 1.3

rules.description: Equipment Details — identifies equipment used for transport, primarily containers for sea shipments and exchangeable EUR flat pallets.

equipment_type_code_qualifier.description: Equipment type code qualifier. CN=Container (only valid for Sea shipments), EFP=Exchangeable EUR flat pallet

equipment_identifier.description: Equipment identifier (composite C237, first sub-component). For Sea: Container Number. Not used for Air, Road, Courier.

equipment_code_list_id.description: Code list identification code — Not used

equipment_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

equipment_size_type_code.description: Equipment size and type description code (composite C224, first sub-component). DSV-defined container types or ISO codes. Examples: 20GP, 20HC, 40HC, 40RE, 45HC, 20FR, 20OT, 20RE, 40FR, 20DC_HT, EFP

equipment_iso_code.description: Code list identification code (composite C224, second sub-component). For Sea: Container type ISO code (e.g., 22G0, 22G1)

equipment_agency_responsible.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C224, third sub-component). For Sea: 5=ISO

equipment_size_type_description.description: Equipment size and type description — Not used

full_empty_indicator_code.description: Full or empty indicator code — Not used

rules.description: Number of Units — specifies the number of equipment units (EUR pallets or containers).

units_quantity.description: Number of equipment units, EUR pallet or Container (composite C523, first sub-component)

unit_type_code_qualifier.description: Unit type code qualifier — Not used

rules.description: Free Text — provides free text information including goods descriptions, handling instructions, delivery instructions, loading remarks, and various DSV-specific text fields. Up to 99 occurrences.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier (4451). AAA=Goods item description, AAI=General information, AEB=Temperature control instructions, BLR=Transport contract document remark/Delivery instruction, CLR=Loading remarks/Pickup instructions, HAN=Consignment handling instruction, IDS=IDS Service code, MKS=Additional marks/numbers, PAY=Payables information, RPT=Report information, SIC=Consignment documentary instruction/Special instruction, SPH=Special handling, ZAD=Additional details, ZAW=Air Waybill Notes, ZBL=Delivery instructions, ZCF=CustomField, ZDM=DropMode, ZFP=Freight payer, ZPT=PassThrough, ZLR=Loading remarks, ZTF=Traffic from

free_text_function_code.description: Free text function code (4453). PCK=DropMode Pickup, DEL=DropMode Delivery

free_text_description_code.description: Free text description code (C107/4441). Not used in standard setups.

free_text_description_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C107/1131). Not used.

free_text_description_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C107/3055). Not used.

free_text_1.description: Free text line 1 (C108/4440). Transport instructions, document remarks, loading remarks, or other text content up to 512 characters.

free_text_2.description: Free text line 2 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_3.description: Free text line 3 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_4.description: Free text line 4 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_5.description: Free text line 5 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_format_code.description: Free text format code (4447). Not used.

rules.description: Free Text - Dangerous Goods Additional Information — within DGS group (SG33) for dangerous goods additional information.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — AAC = Dangerous goods additional information

text_literal_1.description: Free text line 1 (first sub-component of C108). Dangerous goods additional information.

rules.description: Free Text - Proper Shipping Name — within DGS group (SG33) for Proper Shipping Name of dangerous goods.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — AAD = Proper Shipping Name

text_literal_1.description: Free text line 1 — Proper Shipping Name (first sub-component of C108)

rules.description: Free Text - Hazard Information — within DGS group (SG33) for Technical Name and International Technical Name of dangerous goods.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — HAZ = Hazard information

rules.description: Nature of Cargo — specifies the nature of cargo and commodity code for the goods item.

cargo_type_classification_code.description: Cargo type classification code (composite C703, sub-element 7085)

product_group_name_code.description: Commodity Code — product group name code (composite C288, sub-element 5389)

rules.description: Goods Item Details — identifies a goods item within the shipment with package count and type. At least one GID group is mandatory.

goods_item_number.description: Goods item number — sequential line item number

package_quantity.description: Package quantity (composite C213 first occurrence, sub-element 7224). Number of packages at shipment level (CNT+11) or for each line item is required for Road.

package_type_description_code.description: Package type description code (composite C213 first occurrence, sub-element 7065). Required for Road. E.g., PLL=Pallet.

packaging_related_description_code_5th_c.description: Packaging related description code on the 5th C213 composite (sub-element 7233). INR=InnerGoodsItems. Used for Air/Sea to indicate SG19 is nested for inner goods items.

rules.description: Goods Identity Number — used at line item level (SG24) in conjunction with PCI. Supports serial numbers (BN with PCI+17) and SSCC codes (AW with PCI+18). Up to 5 pairs of identity number ranges per segment, max 10 occurrences.

object_identification_code_qualifier.description: Object identification code qualifier — BN = Serial number (used with PCI+17), AW = Serial shipping container code (used with PCI+18)

identity_number_1a.description: First object identifier in first identity number range (C208). For AW, SSCC expected without leading 00 qualifier.

identity_number_1b.description: Second object identifier in first identity number range

identity_number_2a.description: First object identifier in second identity number range (C208)

identity_number_2b.description: Second object identifier in second identity number range

identity_number_3a.description: First object identifier in third identity number range (C208)

identity_number_3b.description: Second object identifier in third identity number range

identity_number_4a.description: First object identifier in fourth identity number range (C208)

identity_number_4b.description: Second object identifier in fourth identity number range

identity_number_5a.description: First object identifier in fifth identity number range (C208)

identity_number_5b.description: Second object identifier in fifth identity number range

rules.description: Governmental Requirements — specifies governmental requirements related to the transport, such as export, import, or transit declarations.

government_action_1.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_2.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_3.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_4.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

rules.description: Handling Instructions — indicates handling instructions for goods items, such as stackability.

handling_instruction_description_code.description: Handling instruction description code (composite C524, sub-element 4079). 3=Stacked, ZNS=No Stackability

rules.description: Place Location Identification — identifies locations relevant to the shipment, including booking office location (SG1) and place of terms of delivery (SG2).

location_function_code_qualifier.description: Location function code qualifier (3227). Valid codes: ZBO=Booking office, 1=Place of terms of delivery.

location_identifier.description: Location identifier (C517/3225). Used for Branch code (Air/Sea) or Booking Office code (Road). UN Location Code when used for terms of delivery.

location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C517/3055). Valid codes: 3=IATA, 6=UN/ECE, 87=Assigned by carrier.

location_name.description: Location name (C517/3224). Term Location name required for Road when LOC qualifier is 1.

first_related_location_identifier.description: First related location identifier (C519/3223). Used for Department code (Air/Sea). Not used for Road or Courier.

first_related_location_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C519/1131). Not used.

first_related_location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C519/3055). Not used.

first_related_location_name.description: First related location name (C519/3222). Not used.

second_related_location_identifier.description: Second related location identifier (C553/3233). Used for Country code. Not used for Road, Solutions, or Courier.

second_related_location_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C553/1131). Not used.

second_related_location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C553/3055). Not used.

second_related_location_name.description: Second related location name (C553/3232). Not used.

rules.description: Measurements — specifies measurements related to goods items, including weights, volumes, counts, and dangerous goods measurements. Used in SG21 (goods item level) and SG35 (dangerous goods level).

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier. Valid codes: WT=Weights, CT=Counts, VOL=Volume, LMT=Limits

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code (composite C502, first sub-component). Valid codes: AAF=Net net weight, AFN=Net explosive weight, AAB=Goods item gross weight, ADZ=Adjusted gross weight, SQ=Sequence, ZOT=Other count. May be empty.

non_discrete_measurement_name_code.description: Non-discrete measurement name code — Not used

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C174, first sub-component). Valid codes include: KGM=kilogram, LTR=litre, MTQ=cubic metre, MTR=metre, PLL=pallet, NMP=number of packs, and DGS package types.

measure.description: The measured value (composite C174, second sub-component)

surface_or_layer_code.description: Surface or layer code — Not used

rules.description: Measurements - Pallet Spaces Count — measurement for number of pallet spaces at line item level. Not used for Air, Sea, or Courier shipments. Requires special pallet space agreement.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — CT = Counts

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — SQ = Shipped quantity (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — PLL = Pallet spaces (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

rules.description: Measurements - Outturn Packages Count — measurement for number of outturn packages at line item level. DSV-specific code, use as agreed.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — CT = Counts

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — ZOT = DSV specific code for Outturn Packages (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — NMP = number of packs (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

rules.description: Measurements - Loading Meters at line item level (SG21). Not used for Air, Sea, or Courier shipments.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — LMT = Loading meters

measurement_details.description: C502 Measurement details composite — Not used for LMT variant

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — MTR = metre (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (loading meters quantity in metres)

rules.description: Measurements - Volume in cubic meters at line item level (SG21). At least one of volume, loading meters, or dimensions is required.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — VOL = Volume

measurement_details.description: C502 Measurement details composite — Not used for VOL variant

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — MTQ = cubic metre (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (volume quantity in cubic metres)

rules.description: Measurements - Net Weight in kilograms at line item level. Only required for customs declaration purposes.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — WT = Weights

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — ADZ = Declared net weight (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — KGM = kilogram (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (net weight in kilograms)

rules.description: Monetary Amount — specifies monetary amounts related to the shipment, including cash on delivery, insurance, invoice amounts, and freight rates.

monetary_amount_type_code_qualifier.description: Monetary amount type code qualifier (C516/5025). 22=Consignment cash on delivery amount, 67=Insurance amount, 77=Invoice line item amount, ZFR=DSV specific FreightRate

currency_identification_code.description: Currency identification code (C516/6345). ISO 4217 3 alpha code (e.g., SEK, DKK, EUR)

currency_type_code_qualifier.description: Currency type code qualifier (C516/6343). Not used.

rules.description: Name and Address — identifies parties involved in the shipment by function (consignor, consignee, delivery party, etc.) with their identification and address details.

party_function_code_qualifier.description: Party function code qualifier. AG=Agent, AJ=Party issuing mutually agreed codes, CA=Carrier, CN=Consignee, CZ=Consignor, DP=Delivery party, FP=Freight/charges payer, NI=Notify party, OY=Ordering customer, PW=Despatch party, FW=Freight forwarder

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code (composite C082, sub-element 1131) — Not used

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C082, sub-element 3055). 87=Assigned by carrier, 91=Assigned by seller, 9=GS1, Z87=DSV specific unique party ID

party_name_1.description: Party name — first occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036). DSV uses 35 characters in first and second occurrences.

party_name_2.description: Party name — second occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036)

party_name_3.description: Party name — third occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036)

party_name_format_code.description: Party name format code (composite C080, sub-element 3045). ZAO=Address override

street_and_number_1.description: Street name and number (composite C059, sub-element 3042, first occurrence). P.O. Box not acceptable for NAD+PW or NAD+DP.

street_and_number_2.description: Additional address info — gate or building (composite C059, sub-element 3042, second occurrence)

street_and_number_3.description: Street and number or post office box identifier — third occurrence (composite C059, sub-element 3042)

city_name.description: City name (without postal code). Required for Road.

country_identifier.description: Country code, ISO 3166 - Alpha 2 code. Required for Road.

rules.description: Package Identification at line item level (SG24). Supports marking instructions codes 17 (serial numbers), 18 (SSCC codes), and 24 (shipper assigned package marks).

marking_instructions_code.description: Marking instructions code — 17=Seller's instructions (serial numbers), 18=Carrier's instructions (SSCC code), 24=Shipper assigned

shipping_marks_1.description: Shipping marks description (first occurrence). Used with qualifier 24 for package mark/IDs.

rules.description: Additional Product ID — provides Harmonised System codes with optional country codes for customs purposes.

item_identifier_1.description: Item identifier — statistical number per Harmonised system (composite C212 first occurrence). For Road, if >8 chars a space must be inserted after position 8.

item_type_identification_code_1.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 first occurrence). HS=Harmonised system

code_list_identification_code_1.description: Code list identification code — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (composite C212 first occurrence). Required for Air/Sea.

code_list_responsible_agency_code_1.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 first occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_2.description: Item identifier — second HS code (composite C212 second occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_2.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 second occurrence). HS=Harmonised system

code_list_identification_code_2.description: Code list identification code — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (composite C212 second occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_2.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 second occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_3.description: Item identifier — third HS code (composite C212 third occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_3.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 third occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_3.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 third occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_3.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 third occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_4.description: Item identifier — fourth HS code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_4.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_4.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_4.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 fourth occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_5.description: Item identifier — fifth HS code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_5.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_5.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_5.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 fifth occurrence). 5=ISO

rules.description: Reference — specifies reference numbers and identifiers for the shipment, including consignment numbers, order references, and various DSV-specific reference types.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier (C506/1153). AG=Multiple Deliveries Discount ID, AAM=Waybill number, AAO=Consignment identifier consignee assigned, AAS=Transport contract document identifier, AAU=Despatch note document identifier, AWM=Service category reference, BN=Consignment identifier carrier assigned, CG=Consignee's order number, CU=Consignment identifier consignor assigned (mandatory for Track&Trace), SRN=Shipment reference number (GS1, 17 chars), STS=StatusText, ZAD=On sight authorization code, ZCP=CLPartnerCode, ZCU=OrderReference, ZDO=DSV ESBDomain, ZIR=InterimReceiptNo, ZTF=Traffic from assigned by Partner, ZHP=AllowHomePortDefaulting, ZHT=HouseBillType, ZMT=DSV specific for Method, ZRM=Receiver Mailbox for Dinas, ZSM=Sender Mailbox for Dinas, ZSR=ShipperReference, ZUS=AllowUpdateShipmentFromBooking, ZXX=Unidentified Reference

reference_identifier.description: Reference identifier (C506/1154). The actual reference number value.

document_line_identifier.description: Document line identifier (C506/1156). Only used when RFF C506/1153 = STS.

rules.description: Reference - Goods Item Information. Reference segment at line item level (SG23) for goods item information.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier — AVM = Goods item information (first sub-component of C506)

rules.description: Reference - Packing List Number. Reference segment at line item level (SG23) for packing list number.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier — PK = Packing list number (first sub-component of C506)

rules.description: Range Details — Specifies temperature range details for goods items requiring temperature control.

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C280, sub-element 6411). CEL=degree Celsius. Only Celsius is used, not Fahrenheit.

rules.description: Seal Number — Specifies seal numbers applied to transport equipment (containers).

transport_unit_seal_identifier.description: Transport unit seal identifier — the seal number

sealing_party_name_code.description: Sealing party name code (composite C215, first sub-component). SH = Shipper

seal_code_list_id.description: Code list identification code — Not used

seal_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

object_identifier_1.description: Object identifier (composite C208, first sub-component) — Not used

object_identifier_2.description: Object identifier (composite C208, second sub-component) — Not used

rules.description: Split Goods Placement — Identifies masterpallet ID (Road) or container ID (Sea) the GID items are related to.

equipment_identifier.description: Equipment identifier — masterpallet ID (Road) or container ID (Sea). First sub-component of C237.

rules.description: Charge/Rate Calculations — Specifies charge and rate/tariff calculation details. Internal DSV use only.

freight_and_other_charges_description_id.description: Freight and other charges description identifier. Code values to be provided by local CargoLink country.

code_list_responsible_agency_code_1.description: Code list responsible agency code (not used)

freight_and_other_charges_description.description: Freight and other charges description (future use)

payment_arrangement_code.description: Payment arrangement code indicating which party pays. ZCN=Consignee, ZCZ=Consignor, ZDP=Delivery party, ZPW=Pickup party. Not used for Air or Courier.

rate_or_tariff_class_description_code.description: Rate or tariff class description code. ZAC=Agreement Code

code_list_identification_code_2.description: Code list identification code for rate/tariff (not used)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_2.description: Code list responsible agency code for rate/tariff (not used)

rate_or_tariff_class_description.description: Rate or tariff class description text

rules.description: Transport Information — Specifies transport stage details including mode of transport and carrier identification. Used with TSR to determine product/service.

transport_stage_code_qualifier.description: Transport stage code qualifier — typically 20 = Main carriage transport

means_of_transport_journey_identifier.description: Means of transport journey identifier (e.g., voyage/flight number)

mode_of_transport_code.description: Mode of transport code — 3 = Road, 4 = Air, 5 = Sea (also used for Courier combinations)

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code for carrier

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code for carrier

rules.description: Transport Movement Details — Specifies transport movement type details, primarily for container stuffing/stripping arrangements (LCL/FCL) and door-to-door service types.

movement_type_description_code.description: Movement type description code. 2=LCL/LCL, 3=FCL/FCL, 4=FCL/LCL, 5=LCL/FCL, 11=House to house, 12=House to terminal, 13=House to pier, 19=Consignee transportation provided, 21=Terminal to house, 22=Terminal to terminal, 23=Terminal to pier, 31=Pier to house, 32=Pier to terminal, 33=Pier to pier

rules.description: Interchange Header — identifies the interchange sender, recipient, and preparation date/time

syntax_identifier.description: Syntax identifier — UNOC means uppercase and lowercase characters A-Z, a-z, including western European special characters

sender_identification_code_qualifier.description: Identification code qualifier — 14 = GS1, ZZ = Mutually defined

interchange_recipient_identification.description: Interchange recipient identification — DSV recipient ID is 5790000110018

date_of_preparation.description: Date of preparation in format CCYYMMDD

time_of_preparation.description: Time of preparation in format HHMM

interchange_control_reference.description: Interchange control reference — unique reference for the interchange

test_indicator.description: Test indicator — 1 = Interchange is a test

rules.description: Message Header — identifies the beginning of a message with reference number and message type

message_version_number.description: Message version number — D = Draft version/UN/EDIFACT Directory

rules.description: Transport Service Requirements — specifies insurance services and additional service codes

contract_and_carriage_condition_code.description: Contract and carriage condition code (C536/4065). Not used in standard implementation.

contract_and_carriage_condition_code_lis.description: Code list identification code (C536/1131). Not used.

contract_and_carriage_condition_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C536/3055). Not used.

service_requirement_code_1.description: Service requirement code (C233/7273). 29=Insure goods during transport, R01-R52=Road Booking additional services

service_requirement_code_1_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C233/1131). Not used.

service_requirement_code_1_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C233/3055). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2.description: Second service requirement code (C233/7273). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2_code_list.description: Code list identification code for second service requirement (C233/1131). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code for second service requirement (C233/3055). Not used.

transport_service_priority_code.description: Transport service priority code (C537/4219). Not used.

transport_priority_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C537/1131). Not used.

transport_priority_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C537/3055). Not used.

cargo_type_classification_code.description: Cargo type classification code (C703/7085). Required when service code=29. Z1=Ordinary new commercial goods, Z2=Used trading goods, Z3=High Risk goods, Z4=Fragile goods, Z5=Household goods and motor vehicles.

cargo_type_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C703/1131). Not used.

cargo_type_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C703/3055). Required for TSR++29. 87 = Assigned by carrier.

rules.description: Terms of Delivery or Transport — specifies Incoterms and Combiterms

delivery_or_transport_terms_function_cod.description: Delivery or transport terms function code (4055). 6=Delivery condition.

transport_charges_payment_method_code.description: Transport charges payment method code (4215). Not used.

delivery_or_transport_terms_description_.description: Delivery or transport terms description code (C100/4053). Incoterm code or numeric Combiterm code.

delivery_terms_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C100/1131). Leave blank for Incoterms. Use ZCT for Combiterms.

delivery_terms_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C100/3055). Not used.

delivery_terms_description_1.description: Delivery or transport terms description (C100/4052). Not used.

delivery_terms_description_2.description: Delivery or transport terms description 2 (C100/4052). Not used.

rules.description: Temperature — specifies temperature requirements for transport equipment (e.g., reefer containers)

temperature_degree.description: Temperature degree (composite C239, first sub-component). The temperature setting value.

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C239, second sub-component). CEL = degree Celsius

rules.description: Message Trailer — identifies the end of the message and provides segment count

number_of_segments.description: Number of segments in a message, including UNH and UNT

message_reference_number.description: Message reference number — must match the reference in UNH

rules.description: Interchange Trailer — identifies the end of the interchange and provides message count

interchange_control_count.description: Number of messages in the interchange

interchange_control_reference.description: Interchange control reference — must match the reference in UNB

BGM.description: Beginning of Message — identifies the beginning of the message and its type. Specifies document type, identifier and message function.

document_name_code.description: Document name code — 335 = Pre booking (Air/Sea), 610 = Forwarding instructions, ZEB = ExternalBookingRequest, ZBJ = BrokerageJob

document_identifier.description: Waybill number or another reference to the message. Must be unique for at least 1 year. Required on all messages.

message_function_code.description: Message function — 1 = Cancellation, 5 = Replace, 9 = Original. For Air/Sea only code 9 is used.

CNT.description: Control Total — specifies control totals for the shipment including gross weight, package quantity, volume, loading metres, and pallet spaces. Can occur up to 9 times.

control_total_type_code_qualifier.description: Control total type code qualifier — 7=Total gross weight, 11=Consignment package quantity, 15=Total consignment cube (volume), 19=Total reported quantity in supplementary units (pallet spaces), 57=Total loading metres

control_total_quantity.description: Control total quantity value — numeric value for weight, package count, volume, loading metres, or pallet spaces

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — For qualifier 7 use KGM; for qualifier 11 use package type codes (EUR, PL, PCE, etc.); for qualifier 15 use MTQ; for qualifier 19 use PLL, HLP, or KPL; for qualifier 57 use MTR

COM.description: Communication Contact — provides communication contact details (phone, email, fax) for a party contact. Can occur up to 9 times per CTA.

communication_address_identifier.description: Communication address identifier — phone number, email address, fax number, etc.

communication_means_type_code.description: Communication means type code — AL=Cellular phone, EM=Electronic mail, FX=Telefax, TE=Telephone

CPI.description: Charge Payment Instructions — specifies charge payment instructions including who pays for the transport charges. Used within SG6 (up to 9 occurrences).

transport_charges_payment_method_code.description: Transport charges payment method code (e.g., prepaid, collect)

CTA.description: Contact Information — identifies the contact person associated with a party (NAD). Mandatory if COM segment is present.

DGS.description: Dangerous Goods — at line item level (SG33). Required for dangerous goods services. If dangerous goods present but no detailed information available, text 'HAZARD' needs to be used.

dangerous_goods_regulations_code.description: Dangerous goods regulations code — ADR = European agreement for road, IMD = IMO IMDG code

hazard_identification_code.description: Hazard identification code. Text 'HAZARD' should be entered if structured information is not available.

hazard_code_version_identifier.description: Hazard code version identifier. For Road, three Sub-Risk values separated by '+' using escape character

dangerous_goods_flashpoint_description.description: Dangerous goods flashpoint description. Road TMS only caters for 4 characters.

shipment_flashpoint_degree.description: Shipment flashpoint degree. Road TMS only caters for 4 characters.

flashpoint_measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code for flashpoint (e.g. CEL for Celsius)

packaging_danger_level_code.description: Packaging danger level code — 1 = Great danger, 2 = Medium danger, 3 = Minor danger

hazard_medical_first_aid_guide_identifie.description: Hazard medical first aid guide identifier

orange_hazard_placard_upper_part_identif.description: Orange hazard placard upper part identifier

orange_hazard_placard_lower_part_identif.description: Orange hazard placard lower part identifier

dangerous_goods_marking_identifier_4.description: Dangerous goods marking identifier (fourth, added by DSV spec)

transport_means_description_code.description: Transport means description code. Use 'LQ' for limited quantity (Road).

DIM.description: Dimensions — length, width, height at line item level (SG22). Part of the alternative measurement requirement alongside volume and loading meters.

dimension_type_code_qualifier.description: Dimension type code qualifier — 1 = Gross dimensions

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — CMT = centimetre, MTR = metre. For Road, dimensions must be in MTR.

DOC.description: Document Message Details — specifies document or message details, particularly for sea transport documentation types. Can occur up to 9 times.

document_name_code.description: Document name code — 706=Bill of lading original, 712=Non-negotiable maritime transport document, 710=Sea waybill, NON=Non-controlled shipment

document_name_code_list.description: Code list identification code — Not used

document_name_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

communication_medium_type_code.description: Communication medium type code — Not used

document_copies_required_quantity.description: Document copies required quantity — number of document copies needed

document_originals_required_quantity.description: Document originals required quantity — number of original documents needed

DTM.description: Date/Time/Period — specifies date/time/period information including delivery date, document issue date, collection date, and transport dates. At least one DTM with qualifier 137 is mandatory.

date_time_period_function_code_qualifier.description: Date/time/period function code qualifier — 2=Delivery date/time requested, 137=Document issue date time, 234=Collection date/time earliest, 132=Transport means arrival estimated, 133=Transport means departure estimated, 171=Reference date/time, 189=Transport means departure scheduled, 232=Transport means arrival scheduled

date_time_period_text.description: Date or time or period value in the format specified by element 1.3

EQD.description: Equipment Details — identifies equipment used for transport, primarily containers for sea shipments and exchangeable EUR flat pallets.

equipment_type_code_qualifier.description: Equipment type code qualifier. CN=Container (only valid for Sea shipments), EFP=Exchangeable EUR flat pallet

equipment_identifier.description: Equipment identifier (composite C237, first sub-component). For Sea: Container Number. Not used for Air, Road, Courier.

equipment_code_list_id.description: Code list identification code — Not used

equipment_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

equipment_size_type_code.description: Equipment size and type description code (composite C224, first sub-component). DSV-defined container types or ISO codes. Examples: 20GP, 20HC, 40HC, 40RE, 45HC, 20FR, 20OT, 20RE, 40FR, 20DC_HT, EFP

equipment_iso_code.description: Code list identification code (composite C224, second sub-component). For Sea: Container type ISO code (e.g., 22G0, 22G1)

equipment_agency_responsible.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C224, third sub-component). For Sea: 5=ISO

equipment_size_type_description.description: Equipment size and type description — Not used

full_empty_indicator_code.description: Full or empty indicator code — Not used

EQN.description: Number of Units — specifies the number of equipment units (EUR pallets or containers).

units_quantity.description: Number of equipment units, EUR pallet or Container (composite C523, first sub-component)

unit_type_code_qualifier.description: Unit type code qualifier — Not used

FTX.description: Free Text — provides free text information including goods descriptions, handling instructions, delivery instructions, loading remarks, and various DSV-specific text fields. Up to 99 occurrences.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier (4451). AAA=Goods item description, AAI=General information, AEB=Temperature control instructions, BLR=Transport contract document remark/Delivery instruction, CLR=Loading remarks/Pickup instructions, HAN=Consignment handling instruction, IDS=IDS Service code, MKS=Additional marks/numbers, PAY=Payables information, RPT=Report information, SIC=Consignment documentary instruction/Special instruction, SPH=Special handling, ZAD=Additional details, ZAW=Air Waybill Notes, ZBL=Delivery instructions, ZCF=CustomField, ZDM=DropMode, ZFP=Freight payer, ZPT=PassThrough, ZLR=Loading remarks, ZTF=Traffic from

free_text_function_code.description: Free text function code (4453). PCK=DropMode Pickup, DEL=DropMode Delivery

free_text_description_code.description: Free text description code (C107/4441). Not used in standard setups.

free_text_description_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C107/1131). Not used.

free_text_description_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C107/3055). Not used.

free_text_1.description: Free text line 1 (C108/4440). Transport instructions, document remarks, loading remarks, or other text content up to 512 characters.

free_text_2.description: Free text line 2 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_3.description: Free text line 3 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_4.description: Free text line 4 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_5.description: Free text line 5 (C108/4440). Additional text up to 512 characters.

free_text_format_code.description: Free text format code (4447). Not used.

FTX_AAC.description: Free Text - Dangerous Goods Additional Information — within DGS group (SG33) for dangerous goods additional information.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — AAC = Dangerous goods additional information

text_literal_1.description: Free text line 1 (first sub-component of C108). Dangerous goods additional information.

FTX_AAD.description: Free Text - Proper Shipping Name — within DGS group (SG33) for Proper Shipping Name of dangerous goods.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — AAD = Proper Shipping Name

text_literal_1.description: Free text line 1 — Proper Shipping Name (first sub-component of C108)

FTX_HAZ.description: Free Text - Hazard Information — within DGS group (SG33) for Technical Name and International Technical Name of dangerous goods.

text_subject_code_qualifier.description: Text subject code qualifier — HAZ = Hazard information

GDS.description: Nature of Cargo — specifies the nature of cargo and commodity code for the goods item.

cargo_type_classification_code.description: Cargo type classification code (composite C703, sub-element 7085)

product_group_name_code.description: Commodity Code — product group name code (composite C288, sub-element 5389)

GID.description: Goods Item Details — identifies a goods item within the shipment with package count and type. At least one GID group is mandatory.

goods_item_number.description: Goods item number — sequential line item number

package_quantity.description: Package quantity (composite C213 first occurrence, sub-element 7224). Number of packages at shipment level (CNT+11) or for each line item is required for Road.

package_type_description_code.description: Package type description code (composite C213 first occurrence, sub-element 7065). Required for Road. E.g., PLL=Pallet.

packaging_related_description_code_5th_c.description: Packaging related description code on the 5th C213 composite (sub-element 7233). INR=InnerGoodsItems. Used for Air/Sea to indicate SG19 is nested for inner goods items.

GIN.description: Goods Identity Number — used at line item level (SG24) in conjunction with PCI. Supports serial numbers (BN with PCI+17) and SSCC codes (AW with PCI+18). Up to 5 pairs of identity number ranges per segment, max 10 occurrences.

object_identification_code_qualifier.description: Object identification code qualifier — BN = Serial number (used with PCI+17), AW = Serial shipping container code (used with PCI+18)

identity_number_1a.description: First object identifier in first identity number range (C208). For AW, SSCC expected without leading 00 qualifier.

identity_number_1b.description: Second object identifier in first identity number range

identity_number_2a.description: First object identifier in second identity number range (C208)

identity_number_2b.description: Second object identifier in second identity number range

identity_number_3a.description: First object identifier in third identity number range (C208)

identity_number_3b.description: Second object identifier in third identity number range

identity_number_4a.description: First object identifier in fourth identity number range (C208)

identity_number_4b.description: Second object identifier in fourth identity number range

identity_number_5a.description: First object identifier in fifth identity number range (C208)

identity_number_5b.description: Second object identifier in fifth identity number range

GOR.description: Governmental Requirements — specifies governmental requirements related to the transport, such as export, import, or transit declarations.

government_action_1.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_2.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_3.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

government_action_4.description: Government action composite (not used in implementation)

HAN.description: Handling Instructions — indicates handling instructions for goods items, such as stackability.

handling_instruction_description_code.description: Handling instruction description code (composite C524, sub-element 4079). 3=Stacked, ZNS=No Stackability

LOC.description: Place Location Identification — identifies locations relevant to the shipment, including booking office location (SG1) and place of terms of delivery (SG2).

location_function_code_qualifier.description: Location function code qualifier (3227). Valid codes: ZBO=Booking office, 1=Place of terms of delivery.

location_identifier.description: Location identifier (C517/3225). Used for Branch code (Air/Sea) or Booking Office code (Road). UN Location Code when used for terms of delivery.

location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C517/3055). Valid codes: 3=IATA, 6=UN/ECE, 87=Assigned by carrier.

location_name.description: Location name (C517/3224). Term Location name required for Road when LOC qualifier is 1.

first_related_location_identifier.description: First related location identifier (C519/3223). Used for Department code (Air/Sea). Not used for Road or Courier.

first_related_location_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C519/1131). Not used.

first_related_location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C519/3055). Not used.

first_related_location_name.description: First related location name (C519/3222). Not used.

second_related_location_identifier.description: Second related location identifier (C553/3233). Used for Country code. Not used for Road, Solutions, or Courier.

second_related_location_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C553/1131). Not used.

second_related_location_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C553/3055). Not used.

second_related_location_name.description: Second related location name (C553/3232). Not used.

MEA.description: Measurements — specifies measurements related to goods items, including weights, volumes, counts, and dangerous goods measurements. Used in SG21 (goods item level) and SG35 (dangerous goods level).

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier. Valid codes: WT=Weights, CT=Counts, VOL=Volume, LMT=Limits

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code (composite C502, first sub-component). Valid codes: AAF=Net net weight, AFN=Net explosive weight, AAB=Goods item gross weight, ADZ=Adjusted gross weight, SQ=Sequence, ZOT=Other count. May be empty.

non_discrete_measurement_name_code.description: Non-discrete measurement name code — Not used

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C174, first sub-component). Valid codes include: KGM=kilogram, LTR=litre, MTQ=cubic metre, MTR=metre, PLL=pallet, NMP=number of packs, and DGS package types.

measure.description: The measured value (composite C174, second sub-component)

surface_or_layer_code.description: Surface or layer code — Not used

MEA_CT_SQ.description: Measurements - Pallet Spaces Count — measurement for number of pallet spaces at line item level. Not used for Air, Sea, or Courier shipments. Requires special pallet space agreement.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — CT = Counts

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — SQ = Shipped quantity (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — PLL = Pallet spaces (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

MEA_CT_ZOT.description: Measurements - Outturn Packages Count — measurement for number of outturn packages at line item level. DSV-specific code, use as agreed.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — CT = Counts

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — ZOT = DSV specific code for Outturn Packages (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — NMP = number of packs (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

MEA_LMT.description: Measurements - Loading Meters at line item level (SG21). Not used for Air, Sea, or Courier shipments.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — LMT = Loading meters

measurement_details.description: C502 Measurement details composite — Not used for LMT variant

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — MTR = metre (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (loading meters quantity in metres)

MEA_VOL.description: Measurements - Volume in cubic meters at line item level (SG21). At least one of volume, loading meters, or dimensions is required.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — VOL = Volume

measurement_details.description: C502 Measurement details composite — Not used for VOL variant

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — MTQ = cubic metre (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (volume quantity in cubic metres)

MEA_WT.description: Measurements - Net Weight in kilograms at line item level. Only required for customs declaration purposes.

measurement_purpose_code_qualifier.description: Measurement purpose code qualifier — WT = Weights

measured_attribute_code.description: Measured attribute code — ADZ = Declared net weight (first sub-component of C502)

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code — KGM = kilogram (first sub-component of C174 Value/range)

measure.description: The measured value (net weight in kilograms)

MOA.description: Monetary Amount — specifies monetary amounts related to the shipment, including cash on delivery, insurance, invoice amounts, and freight rates.

monetary_amount_type_code_qualifier.description: Monetary amount type code qualifier (C516/5025). 22=Consignment cash on delivery amount, 67=Insurance amount, 77=Invoice line item amount, ZFR=DSV specific FreightRate

currency_identification_code.description: Currency identification code (C516/6345). ISO 4217 3 alpha code (e.g., SEK, DKK, EUR)

currency_type_code_qualifier.description: Currency type code qualifier (C516/6343). Not used.

NAD.description: Name and Address — identifies parties involved in the shipment by function (consignor, consignee, delivery party, etc.) with their identification and address details.

party_function_code_qualifier.description: Party function code qualifier. AG=Agent, AJ=Party issuing mutually agreed codes, CA=Carrier, CN=Consignee, CZ=Consignor, DP=Delivery party, FP=Freight/charges payer, NI=Notify party, OY=Ordering customer, PW=Despatch party, FW=Freight forwarder

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code (composite C082, sub-element 1131) — Not used

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C082, sub-element 3055). 87=Assigned by carrier, 91=Assigned by seller, 9=GS1, Z87=DSV specific unique party ID

party_name_1.description: Party name — first occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036). DSV uses 35 characters in first and second occurrences.

party_name_2.description: Party name — second occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036)

party_name_3.description: Party name — third occurrence (composite C080, sub-element 3036)

party_name_format_code.description: Party name format code (composite C080, sub-element 3045). ZAO=Address override

street_and_number_1.description: Street name and number (composite C059, sub-element 3042, first occurrence). P.O. Box not acceptable for NAD+PW or NAD+DP.

street_and_number_2.description: Additional address info — gate or building (composite C059, sub-element 3042, second occurrence)

street_and_number_3.description: Street and number or post office box identifier — third occurrence (composite C059, sub-element 3042)

city_name.description: City name (without postal code). Required for Road.

country_identifier.description: Country code, ISO 3166 - Alpha 2 code. Required for Road.

PCI.description: Package Identification at line item level (SG24). Supports marking instructions codes 17 (serial numbers), 18 (SSCC codes), and 24 (shipper assigned package marks).

marking_instructions_code.description: Marking instructions code — 17=Seller's instructions (serial numbers), 18=Carrier's instructions (SSCC code), 24=Shipper assigned

shipping_marks_1.description: Shipping marks description (first occurrence). Used with qualifier 24 for package mark/IDs.

PIA.description: Additional Product ID — provides Harmonised System codes with optional country codes for customs purposes.

item_identifier_1.description: Item identifier — statistical number per Harmonised system (composite C212 first occurrence). For Road, if >8 chars a space must be inserted after position 8.

item_type_identification_code_1.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 first occurrence). HS=Harmonised system

code_list_identification_code_1.description: Code list identification code — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (composite C212 first occurrence). Required for Air/Sea.

code_list_responsible_agency_code_1.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 first occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_2.description: Item identifier — second HS code (composite C212 second occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_2.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 second occurrence). HS=Harmonised system

code_list_identification_code_2.description: Code list identification code — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (composite C212 second occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_2.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 second occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_3.description: Item identifier — third HS code (composite C212 third occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_3.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 third occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_3.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 third occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_3.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 third occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_4.description: Item identifier — fourth HS code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_4.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_4.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 fourth occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_4.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 fourth occurrence). 5=ISO

item_identifier_5.description: Item identifier — fifth HS code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

item_type_identification_code_5.description: Item type identification code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

code_list_identification_code_5.description: Code list identification code (composite C212 fifth occurrence)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_5.description: Code list responsible agency code (composite C212 fifth occurrence). 5=ISO

RFF.description: Reference — specifies reference numbers and identifiers for the shipment, including consignment numbers, order references, and various DSV-specific reference types.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier (C506/1153). AG=Multiple Deliveries Discount ID, AAM=Waybill number, AAO=Consignment identifier consignee assigned, AAS=Transport contract document identifier, AAU=Despatch note document identifier, AWM=Service category reference, BN=Consignment identifier carrier assigned, CG=Consignee's order number, CU=Consignment identifier consignor assigned (mandatory for Track&Trace), SRN=Shipment reference number (GS1, 17 chars), STS=StatusText, ZAD=On sight authorization code, ZCP=CLPartnerCode, ZCU=OrderReference, ZDO=DSV ESBDomain, ZIR=InterimReceiptNo, ZTF=Traffic from assigned by Partner, ZHP=AllowHomePortDefaulting, ZHT=HouseBillType, ZMT=DSV specific for Method, ZRM=Receiver Mailbox for Dinas, ZSM=Sender Mailbox for Dinas, ZSR=ShipperReference, ZUS=AllowUpdateShipmentFromBooking, ZXX=Unidentified Reference

reference_identifier.description: Reference identifier (C506/1154). The actual reference number value.

document_line_identifier.description: Document line identifier (C506/1156). Only used when RFF C506/1153 = STS.

RFF_AVM.description: Reference - Goods Item Information. Reference segment at line item level (SG23) for goods item information.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier — AVM = Goods item information (first sub-component of C506)

RFF_PK.description: Reference - Packing List Number. Reference segment at line item level (SG23) for packing list number.

reference_code_qualifier.description: Reference code qualifier — PK = Packing list number (first sub-component of C506)

RNG.description: Range Details — Specifies temperature range details for goods items requiring temperature control.

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C280, sub-element 6411). CEL=degree Celsius. Only Celsius is used, not Fahrenheit.

SEL.description: Seal Number — Specifies seal numbers applied to transport equipment (containers).

transport_unit_seal_identifier.description: Transport unit seal identifier — the seal number

sealing_party_name_code.description: Sealing party name code (composite C215, first sub-component). SH = Shipper

seal_code_list_id.description: Code list identification code — Not used

seal_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code — Not used

object_identifier_1.description: Object identifier (composite C208, first sub-component) — Not used

object_identifier_2.description: Object identifier (composite C208, second sub-component) — Not used

SGP.description: Split Goods Placement — Identifies masterpallet ID (Road) or container ID (Sea) the GID items are related to.

equipment_identifier.description: Equipment identifier — masterpallet ID (Road) or container ID (Sea). First sub-component of C237.

TCC.description: Charge/Rate Calculations — Specifies charge and rate/tariff calculation details. Internal DSV use only.

freight_and_other_charges_description_id.description: Freight and other charges description identifier. Code values to be provided by local CargoLink country.

code_list_responsible_agency_code_1.description: Code list responsible agency code (not used)

freight_and_other_charges_description.description: Freight and other charges description (future use)

payment_arrangement_code.description: Payment arrangement code indicating which party pays. ZCN=Consignee, ZCZ=Consignor, ZDP=Delivery party, ZPW=Pickup party. Not used for Air or Courier.

rate_or_tariff_class_description_code.description: Rate or tariff class description code. ZAC=Agreement Code

code_list_identification_code_2.description: Code list identification code for rate/tariff (not used)

code_list_responsible_agency_code_2.description: Code list responsible agency code for rate/tariff (not used)

rate_or_tariff_class_description.description: Rate or tariff class description text

TDT.description: Transport Information — Specifies transport stage details including mode of transport and carrier identification. Used with TSR to determine product/service.

transport_stage_code_qualifier.description: Transport stage code qualifier — typically 20 = Main carriage transport

means_of_transport_journey_identifier.description: Means of transport journey identifier (e.g., voyage/flight number)

mode_of_transport_code.description: Mode of transport code — 3 = Road, 4 = Air, 5 = Sea (also used for Courier combinations)

code_list_identification_code.description: Code list identification code for carrier

code_list_responsible_agency_code.description: Code list responsible agency code for carrier

TMD.description: Transport Movement Details — Specifies transport movement type details, primarily for container stuffing/stripping arrangements (LCL/FCL) and door-to-door service types.

movement_type_description_code.description: Movement type description code. 2=LCL/LCL, 3=FCL/FCL, 4=FCL/LCL, 5=LCL/FCL, 11=House to house, 12=House to terminal, 13=House to pier, 19=Consignee transportation provided, 21=Terminal to house, 22=Terminal to terminal, 23=Terminal to pier, 31=Pier to house, 32=Pier to terminal, 33=Pier to pier

UNB.description: Interchange Header — identifies the interchange sender, recipient, and preparation date/time

syntax_identifier.description: Syntax identifier — UNOC means uppercase and lowercase characters A-Z, a-z, including western European special characters

sender_identification_code_qualifier.description: Identification code qualifier — 14 = GS1, ZZ = Mutually defined

interchange_recipient_identification.description: Interchange recipient identification — DSV recipient ID is 5790000110018

date_of_preparation.description: Date of preparation in format CCYYMMDD

time_of_preparation.description: Time of preparation in format HHMM

interchange_control_reference.description: Interchange control reference — unique reference for the interchange

test_indicator.description: Test indicator — 1 = Interchange is a test

UNH.description: Message Header — identifies the beginning of a message with reference number and message type

message_version_number.description: Message version number — D = Draft version/UN/EDIFACT Directory

TSR.description: Transport Service Requirements — specifies insurance services and additional service codes

contract_and_carriage_condition_code.description: Contract and carriage condition code (C536/4065). Not used in standard implementation.

contract_and_carriage_condition_code_lis.description: Code list identification code (C536/1131). Not used.

contract_and_carriage_condition_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C536/3055). Not used.

service_requirement_code_1.description: Service requirement code (C233/7273). 29=Insure goods during transport, R01-R52=Road Booking additional services

service_requirement_code_1_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C233/1131). Not used.

service_requirement_code_1_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C233/3055). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2.description: Second service requirement code (C233/7273). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2_code_list.description: Code list identification code for second service requirement (C233/1131). Not used.

service_requirement_code_2_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code for second service requirement (C233/3055). Not used.

transport_service_priority_code.description: Transport service priority code (C537/4219). Not used.

transport_priority_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C537/1131). Not used.

transport_priority_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C537/3055). Not used.

cargo_type_classification_code.description: Cargo type classification code (C703/7085). Required when service code=29. Z1=Ordinary new commercial goods, Z2=Used trading goods, Z3=High Risk goods, Z4=Fragile goods, Z5=Household goods and motor vehicles.

cargo_type_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C703/1131). Not used.

cargo_type_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C703/3055). Required for TSR++29. 87 = Assigned by carrier.

TOD.description: Terms of Delivery or Transport — specifies Incoterms and Combiterms

delivery_or_transport_terms_function_cod.description: Delivery or transport terms function code (4055). 6=Delivery condition.

transport_charges_payment_method_code.description: Transport charges payment method code (4215). Not used.

delivery_or_transport_terms_description_.description: Delivery or transport terms description code (C100/4053). Incoterm code or numeric Combiterm code.

delivery_terms_code_list.description: Code list identification code (C100/1131). Leave blank for Incoterms. Use ZCT for Combiterms.

delivery_terms_agency.description: Code list responsible agency code (C100/3055). Not used.

delivery_terms_description_1.description: Delivery or transport terms description (C100/4052). Not used.

delivery_terms_description_2.description: Delivery or transport terms description 2 (C100/4052). Not used.

TMP.description: Temperature — specifies temperature requirements for transport equipment (e.g., reefer containers)

temperature_degree.description: Temperature degree (composite C239, first sub-component). The temperature setting value.

measurement_unit_code.description: Measurement unit code (composite C239, second sub-component). CEL = degree Celsius

UNT.description: Message Trailer — identifies the end of the message and provides segment count

number_of_segments.description: Number of segments in a message, including UNH and UNT

message_reference_number.description: Message reference number — must match the reference in UNH

UNZ.description: Interchange Trailer — identifies the end of the interchange and provides message count

interchange_control_count.description: Number of messages in the interchange

interchange_control_reference.description: Interchange control reference — must match the reference in UNB
